ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kilograms */,
  "dominant_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the subject (e.g., right, left) */,
  "subject_id_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subject (e.g., passport number or institution-assigned ID) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the subject */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the subject */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject withdrew from the study (if applicable) */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the subject has provided consent for data use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject performing the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment (e.g., lab, home, office) */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_subj_id FOREIGN KEY ("subj_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was first used in a trial */,
  "condition_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last used in a trial */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biometric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial during which the data was collected */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame within the trial */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "refX" INTEGER /* Reference X coordinate */,
  "refY" INTEGER /* Reference Y coordinate */,
  "refZ" INTEGER /* Reference Z coordinate */,
  "wristX" INTEGER /* Wrist X coordinate */,
  "wristY" INTEGER /* Wrist Y coordinate */,
  "wristZ" INTEGER /* Wrist Z coordinate */,
  "thumbX" INTEGER /* Thumb X coordinate */,
  "thumbY" INTEGER /* Thumb Y coordinate */,
  "thumbZ" INTEGER /* Thumb Z coordinate */,
  "indexX" INTEGER /* Index finger X coordinate */,
  "indexY" INTEGER /* Index finger Y coordinate */,
  "indexZ" INTEGER /* Index finger Z coordinate */,
  "trial_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the trial (e.g., start, middle, end) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the subject during the data point */,
  "skin_conductance" INTEGER /* Skin conductance of the subject during the data point */,
  "eye_gaze_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the subject's eye gaze */,
  "eye_gaze_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the subject's eye gaze */,
  "eye_gaze_z" INTEGER /* Z-coordinate of the subject's eye gaze */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_trial_phase FOREIGN KEY ("trial_phase") REFERENCES trial_phases ("phase_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Number of the frame within the trial */,
  "frame_description" TEXT /* Description of the frame */,
  "frame_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the frame in milliseconds */,
  "frame_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the phase */,
  "phase_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the phase */,
  "phase_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biometric data point accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for accessing the data (e.g., computer, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES biometric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
